title: Anchored Spec — EA Change
description: An auditable change record tracking modifications to system components, security settings, and data structures.

changeType.description: Type of change (feature, fix, refactor, chore, configuration, security, or custom)

include.description: Glob patterns included in the change scope

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from the change scope

requirements.description: Requirement IDs addressed by this change (REQ, SREQ, DREQ, TREQ, IREQ)

workflowVariant.description: Workflow variant used for this change

baselineRef.description: ID of the authorized baseline configuration this change modifies (NIST SP 800-53 CM-2)

configurationItem.description: The configuration item being changed (e.g., firewall-rules, tls-settings, db-schema)

authorizedBy.description: Person or role who authorized this change

changeAdvisoryBoard.description: Whether this change was reviewed by a Change Advisory Board (CAB)

authorizationStatus.description: Authorization status per NIST configuration change control

nistFunction.description: NIST CSF 2.0 function this change relates to

riskImpact.description: Risk impact of this change on the security posture

securityRelevant.description: Whether this change affects the security posture of the system

continuousMonitoring.description: Whether this change triggers continuous monitoring review per NIST RMF

actor.description: Person or system that performed the action

action.description: Action taken (proposed, reviewed, approved, implemented, verified)

auditTrail.description: Auditable trail of change lifecycle events per NIST SP 800-92
